representative_title: CBN Holds Benchmark Rate at 27.5% as Naira Steadies Against Dollar

members.title: CBN holds rate
members.summary: The Central Bank kept its benchmark rate unchanged at 27.5%.

members.title: Naira steadies
members.summary: The naira held firm against the dollar after the decision.

members.title: Markets react
members.summary: Investors welcomed the decision across trading desks.
